emails.subject: Netco
emails.body: Netco ARe you still in? Louise Kitchen Chief Operating Officer Enron Americas Tel: 713 853 3488 Fax: 713 646 2308

emails.subject: RE: Netco
emails.body: RE: Netco Yep. Jim has asked me to do some accounting stuff for him but unless I'm reading it wrong this does not change our plan. Let's talk, I'd obviously like to get things sorted. B. To: Pearce, Barry

emails.subject: RE: Netco
emails.body: ITs looking like a reduced NetCo we are having huge problems with a round peg and square hole To: Kitchen, Louise
